---
title: Quick Start
---

The team can show you around on the platform. If you need help getting started on the platform, if you need advice about what LLMs to use for your project, or need help running your experiment, the team can help. You can send an email to [Radu Apsan](mailto:r.apsan@vu.nl) and [Marco Otte](mailto:m.otte@vu.nl).
